---
name: New park theme
about: Propose (or contribute) a new national park theme
title: "[theme] "
labels: theme
---

Adding a theme is a great first contribution! See
[docs/THEMES.md](../../docs/THEMES.md) for the full how‑to. Use this issue to
plan it.

**Park**
Which national park? (e.g. Yosemite)

**Palette**
6–9 hex colors that capture it (base, surface, primary, secondary, soft, cream,
gold, ember, draw). See an existing theme in `src/themes.ts` for the shape.

**Tagline**
A one‑line WPA‑poster tagline.

**Art plan**
- [ ] Table scene image (landscape, ~1600×1000) **or** an SVG scene
- [ ] Card‑back artwork (portrait) **or** an SVG emblem
- [ ] Avatars (reuse existing or new)

**Victory line**
A celebratory one‑liner for the winner.

**Are you contributing the implementation, or proposing it for someone else?**
